title: Pungent Mediterranean Bacon Roast
description: A savory, comforting brunch recipe featuring crispy bacon, tender roast, and aromatic Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: Boneless beef roast
ingredients.notes: Choose a cut with good marbling for tenderness

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt and black pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, about 2 minutes per side.
Remove the roast from the pot and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped rosemary to the pot and cook for an additional minute.
Return the beef roast to the pot and add the red wine and beef broth (if using).
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the roast is cooking, cook the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Transfer the bacon to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess fat.
Once the roast is cooked, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Slice the roast against the grain and serve with the crispy bacon, crumbled feta cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
